issues.description: Listed in questIds but only indirectly referenced (praying at altar). Not actively started/progressed but included for diary completion. Consider if this meets the 'actively started/progressed' criteria.
Included in unresolvedItems but is a specific, resolvable item (ID 29140 or similar). Could be resolved rather than left unresolved.

notes: All items_needed entries are legitimate requirements for quest completion and crafting
Content items are all present in the step text and represent actual resources needed
Abstract item (1.7m gp as 'cash stack') is a genuine abstraction and appropriately labeled
Unresolved items for 'moss lizard', 'salve teleport', and 'rod of ivandis' are acceptable given ambiguity in game mechanics/item types

Quest list comprehensively covers all quests mentioned: Curse of the Empty Lord, At First Light, Perilous Moons, The Heart of Darkness, Scrambled, Shadows of Custodia, In Aid of the Myreque, Darkness of Hallowvale, A Taste of Hope, and Sins of the Father
Confidence score reflects high overall accuracy with minor classification questions around VARROCK_HARD and one resolvable item
